# harvester_pcidevice (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "harvester_pcidevice" "hp-49-eno50-vfs" {
  name                = "hp-49-tink-system-000004101"
  passthrough_enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `passthrough_enabled` (Boolean) Enable/Disable PCI passthrough
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) PCI address (e.g., '0000:01:00.0').
- `class_id` (String) PCI class ID (e.g., '0300' for VGA).
- `device_description` (String) Human-readable device description.
- `device_id` (String) PCI device ID.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `iommu_group` (String) IOMMU group of the device.
- `kernel_driver_in_use` (String) Kernel driver currently in use.
- `message` (String)
- `node_name` (String) Node where the PCI device is located.
- `resource_name` (String) Kubernetes device plugin resource name.
- `state` (String)
- `vendor_id` (String) PCI vendor ID (e.g., '8086' for Intel).

<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `default` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `read` (String)
- `update` (String)
